action_set_definitions.name: get_reactor_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current real-time telemetry from the reactor core and primary coolant system sensors.

action_set_definitions.name: analyze_flow_integrity
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a diagnostic check to determine if low flow readings are caused by instrument signal drop-out at low velocities or physical blockages like non-condensable gas accumulation.

example_output.details: High delta-T across steam generators suggests physical flow restriction.

action_set_definitions.name: vent_non_condensable_gas
action_set_definitions.description: Activates the RCS vent valves to release accumulated non-condensable gases from the reactor vessel head or steam generator U-tubes.

vent_duration_seconds.description: Duration to keep vent valves open.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_pdhr_alignment
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the valve positions for the Passive Decay Heat Removal (PDHR) system to optimize the heat sink path.

opening_ratio.description: The target opening ratio for the PDHR valves (0.0 to 1.0).

action_set_definitions.name: stabilize_rcs_pressure
action_set_definitions.description: Commands the pressurizer heaters or spray systems to reach and maintain a specific target pressure in the Reactor Coolant System (RCS).

target_pressure_bar.description: The desired pressure level in Bar.

state_description.thermal_power_mw: Current thermal power output of the reactor core in Megawatts.
state_description.core_temperature_celsius: Average temperature of the reactor core coolant.
state_description.coolant_pressure_bar: Pressure within the primary cooling loop.
state_description.control_rod_insertion_ratio: The percentage of control rod insertion (0.0 = fully withdrawn, 100.0 = fully inserted).
state_description.coolant_flow_rate_m3_s: Flow rate of the primary coolant pumps.
state_description.containment_radiation_level: Radiation level inside the containment building in mSv/h.
state_description.emergency_scram_status: Indicates if the Emergency Shutdown (SCRAM) has been triggered.
